record.field:
Dear {{ object.partner_id.name }},

Please find attached your monthly PRO support invoice {{ object.name }} for the amount of {{ object.amount_total }} {{ object.currency_id.name }}.

Due date: {{ object.invoice_date_due }}

For any queries, please contact us.

Thank you.

Dear Team,

The following service job is overdue:

  • Job No.: {{ object.job_sequence }}
  • Client: {{ object.partner_id.name }}
  • Service: {{ object.service_type_id.name }}
  • Due Date: {{ object.date_deadline }}
  • Assigned To: {{ object.user_ids[0].name if object.user_ids else 'Unassigned' }}

Please update the job status immediately.
